filename: SOP Feedback Management and Customer Complaints.docx
summary: This document is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlining the processes for managing customer feedback and complaints within KeepMeCompany. It details the channels for receiving feedback, classification criteria for serious health-related issues, and the ticketing workflow for resolution and escalation. The SOP also references related quality management documents and emphasizes compliance with regulatory requirements like post-market surveillance.
